metadata.description: Personal Copilot CLI plugin marketplace — reusable plugins for AI-assisted development workflows

plugins.name: squad-federation-core
plugins.description: Federated squad model — transport-agnostic team orchestration with SDK, knowledge lifecycle, OTel observability, and headless automation

plugins.name: squad-archetype-deliverable
plugins.description: Deliverable archetype — iterative teams that scan unstructured sources, distill structured artifacts, and learn from feedback

plugins.name: squad-archetype-coding
plugins.description: Coding archetype — implementation teams that write code, open PRs, and follow full SDLC with review cycles

plugins.name: squad-archetype-consultant
plugins.description: Consultant archetype — domain expert teams that index codebases and answer questions on demand as a persistent knowledge service
